offer_screen_show_logic_sf.description: Root configuration object for the offer screen show logic feature. Contains the list of touchpoints with their offer configurations and the lists of disabled touchpoints/sub-touchpoints.

disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint identifiers that are disabled. When a touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened and returns a CAN_NOT_OPEN state.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint identifiers that are disabled. When a sub-touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened and returns a CAN_NOT_OPEN state.

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations. Each entry defines the offer screen behavior for one or more touchpoints. The system finds a matching touchpoint by name or names list, falling back to the touchpoint named 'default' if no match is found.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint identifiers that this configuration applies to. A touchpoint matches if its identifier is found in this list, in addition to matching against the 'name' field.

name.description: Primary identifier of this touchpoint. Used to match against the requested touchpoint string. A touchpoint named 'default' is used as a fallback when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines a possible offer screen with its screens, session tracking, and launch logic conditions. Entries are evaluated in order; the first one whose launch logic passes is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after the offer interaction.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic condition sets. Each entry defines a set of conditions that must all be met. The offer is shown if ANY entry in this array passes all its conditions. If the array is empty, the offer is shown unconditionally.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the touchpoint.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad in the credits flow. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint with credits flow check enabled.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 means no constraint.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum editor-done count (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 means no constraint. Checked against the number of times the user has completed editor actions.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound, so only app_session_start is checked.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum editor-done count (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum per-touchpoint in-memory session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 means no constraint. Tracked per touchpoint+screens combination within a single app process.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user has previously had a subscription for at least one of the listed packages. When empty, no package history filtering is applied.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on the user's subscription history. When true, the offer is shown only to users who previously had any subscription. When false, only to users who never had a subscription. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a reward interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the touchpoint, with the minimum show interval check skipped.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) for the associated session_key. A value of -1 means no constraint. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter based on whether the current flow is an AI credit flow. When true, the offer is shown only during AI credit flows. When false, only outside AI credit flows. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Preferred touchpoint identifier for this specific launch logic entry. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when present.

repeat_key_session.description: Key session repeat interval. When not -1 and session_key is non-empty, the offer is only shown when (keySessionCount + 1) % (repeatKeySession + 1) == 0. A value of -1 disables this check.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 means no constraint. Checked against the user's cached storage usage percentage.

is_store_available.description: Filter based on Google Play Store billing availability. When true, the offer is shown only if Google Play billing is available. When false, only if Google Play billing is not available. Defaults to true if not specified.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive) for the associated session_key. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty.

repeat_session.description: App session repeat interval. When not -1, the offer is only shown when the app session count is a multiple of this value (appSessionCount % repeatSession == 0). A value of -1 disables this check.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier for this specific launch logic entry. Overridden by offer_screen_touchpoint if that field is present.

restricted_packages.description: List of subscription package and offer ID pairs. When non-empty, all entries must pass the promotional offer eligibility check (via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer) for the offer to be shown.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check user eligibility for a promotional offer.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier used to check user eligibility for a promotional offer.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier types for which the offer should be shown. When empty, no tier filtering is applied. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user's current subscription tier type matches one of the listed values. The value 'free' matches non-subscribed users.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 means no constraint. Checked against the total app session count.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for a given touchpoint. A value of -1 means no daily limit. The daily count resets after 24 hours.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day-pass cooldown period has not yet passed. When false or null/absent, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum per-touchpoint in-memory session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Tracked per touchpoint+screens combination within a single app process.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the user's cached storage usage percentage.

offer_variant.description: Variant identifier for this offer configuration, passed through to the resolved offer screen parameters.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used to build a composite key for per-touchpoint session tracking by joining with dots.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Preferred touchpoint identifier passed through to the resolved offer screen parameters. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when present.

session_key.description: Key used for tracking offer key session counts across app launches, persisted in shared preferences. When non-empty, the key session count is used for key_session_start/key_session_end range checks and repeat_key_session modulo checks.

is_one_time_offer.description: Whether this offer is a one-time purchase offer, as opposed to a recurring subscription offer.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed through to the resolved offer screen parameters. Overridden by offer_screen_touchpoint if that field is present.
